breakdown: Naming: Test function names are highly descriptive (e.g., test_process_action_stream_infers_failure_without_explicit_success). Variables like missing_modules, commands, installed_modules are clear. Error Handling: Tests properly cover error scenarios including failure detection, CalledProcessError handling for fallback packages. Type Safety: Proper type hints throughout (list[list[str]], list[tuple[list[str], dict[str, object]]], Path, set[str]). No any types visible. Architecture: Well-organized tests with proper separation of concerns. Each test focuses on specific functionality using monkeypatch effectively. Test Coverage: Comprehensive tests covering streaming, runtime bootstrap, signature guards, fallback packages, and loc script. Meaningful assertions, no stubs. Documentation: Docstrings on _write_file. Test function names are self-documenting. No commented-out code.
key_changes: Added test for process_action stream failure detection without explicit success
Added test for runtime bootstrap skipping numpy downgrade when not needed
Added test for runtime bootstrap cache invalidation and timeouts
Added test for evidence signature guard skipping external server runs
Added test for runtime bootstrap fallback package candidates
Added new test file test_loc_script.py for LOC script with spaces and boundary-aware test detection
